---
title: "The Rev. Gerald Hartley Buchanan Coleridge"
---

## The Rev. Gerald Hartley Buchanan Coleridge

**Dates:** (26 Jan 1882-24 Nov 1945)

### Description

Vicar of Leatherhead and then of Cornwood, third son of Ernest Coleridge

### Biography

[Roels MS]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
